title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks mixed-provider LLM configurations by running the same coding task four ways with different planning and implementation provider assignments, evaluated against real GitHub issues. The Dark Factory uses Claude Opus for reasoning and Kimi K2.6 for implementation, but the benchmark measures which role assignment is optimal across seven scoring dimensions.
